sub: From day-one solos to 20-person studios — pick your fulfillment lane and mix as your roster needs shift.

cards.title: Website Design & Development
cards.blurb: Conversion-optimized sites built for your clients. Mobile responsive, SEO foundation included. One-off project pricing.

cards.title: Search Engine Optimization
cards.blurb: On-page, off-page, technical. Built as an ongoing retainer for compounding results — with reporting your client trusts.

cards.title: Answer Engine Optimization
cards.blurb: Optimize content for ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. First-mover advantage for your clients in the AI search era.

cards.title: Content & Copywriting
cards.blurb: Blog posts, landing pages, email sequences, ad copy. SEO-informed and written for business outcomes — not vanity metrics.

cards.title: Social Media Management
cards.blurb: Monthly content calendar, graphics, captions, scheduling. Platform-flexible, retainer-based, and tuned to your client's voice.

cards.title: Funnel Building
cards.blurb: End-to-end sales and lead-gen funnels. Platform-flexible, scoped to your client's stack and built to convert.
